headings.text: Boat Detailing & Ceramic Coating in Denver, CO – Protect Your Watercraft
Serving THE Denver Metro And surrounding areas
Keep your boat looking pristine and protected from harsh water elements with professional detailing and System X Marine Ceramic Coating
Why Choose Front Range for Your Boat
What types of boats do you work on?
How often should I detail my boat?
Can you remove heavy oxidation from gelcoat?
Denver's 1st Choice in Paint Protection Film and Clear Bra
Front Range Detail Studio client Reviews

paragraphs: At Front Range Detail Studio, we specialize in high-quality boat detailing and System X Marine Ceramic Coating to keep your watercraft looking like new. Our services are tailored for boats on Colorado lakes and reservoirs, helping you maintain beauty, value, and protection season after season.
Our experienced team understands the unique challenges boats face and uses only marine-grade products for superior protection.
We are certified applicators of System X Marine Ceramic Coating, ensuring professional-grade results.
From hull to topside, we meticulously coat every surface for comprehensive protection.
We offer boat ceramic coating services by appointment during the boating season to ensure the highest quality care.

Full exterior hand wash (including hull and deck), oxidation and water spot removal, gelcoat buffing and polishing for a deep, glossy finish, application of premium marine wax or sealant, stainless steel and chrome polishing.
Vacuum and deep clean all seating, carpets, and upholstery. Vinyl and leather cleaning and conditioning. Mold and mildew treatment. Glass and mirror cleaning. Dashboard and control panel detailing.
Gelcoat-safe, high-quality wax applied after buffing. Shields your boat from Colorado’s intense sun and water spots. Recommended every 12 months for best results. Call for more details.
Multi-stage machine buffing and polishing to remove oxidation. Revives color, depth, and reflectivity. Protect with marine wax or upgrade to ceramic for longest-lasting shine. Call for more details.

Long-lasting hydrophobic and UV-resistant barrier. Easier cleaning, less staining, and dramatic shine. Coverage for hull, topside, stainless steel, and optional interior protection. Manufacturer-backed warranty.
Application of System X Marine Ceramic Coating to hull and topside. Hydrophobic protection and enhanced gloss. Warranty-backed protection.

Application of ceramic coating to all exterior surfaces (hull, topside, and glass). Stainless steel and chrome coated for corrosion resistance. Optional: Interior surfaces treated for added protection.

Upgrade to our Hyper Gloss 9H Lifetime Coating for the ultimate in long-term marine protection. This advanced ceramic coating delivers an exceptionally deep, mirror-like gloss with 9H hardness for maximum scratch and chemical resistance. Backed by a lifetime warranty, it’s the last coating your boat will ever need.
We work on all types — ski boats, pontoons, bass boats, sailboats and yachts. If it’s on the water, we can detail and protect it.
We recommend a full exterior detail and wax at least once a year, with interior cleaning as needed throughout the season.
Yes — our multi-stage machine buffing and polishing restores faded, chalky gelcoat to a deep, glossy finish.
Long-lasting hydrophobic and UV-resistant barrier for easier cleaning, less staining and dramatic shine on hull, topside and stainless.

Preserve the pristine condition of your vehicle with our high-quality Paint Protection Film, or Clear Bra. Our warranty backed PPF acts as an invisible shield, guarding your car's paint against scratches, stone chips, and road debris. With advanced self-healing technology and ceramic coating, your vehicle stays looking brand new. Protect your investment with our expert application.

“Same day service. Excellent and professional service. My RV is 7 years old and just completed a 1500 mile journey Covered in dust, dirt and bug covered windshield Sam cleaned everything and made it look brand new and shiny. I'm very happy with the results.”
— Geri P.

“Brought 10 year old Navion motorhome to Sam for wash, polish and wax job. The quality of workmanship performed by Sam and crew was simply outstanding. We are more than pleased with the results. This is the best RV detailing service I've ever used...”
— TG G.

“We used Front Range Mobile Detailing to detail the exterior of our 20+ year old boat...it looks new. The service specifically was boat oxidation removal and buffing. Sam is very responsive and communicated through the whole process...”
— Cindy T.
“Front range did an excellent job on our 5th wheel & F350! Sam was extremely knowledgeable and explained how he only uses top line products. His team brought the brand new shine back!”
— Alyson W.

“I have nothing but good things to say about Front Range Detail Studio. Impeccable work, driven by attention to detail and obvious care for their customers. Experts at ceramic coating and maintenance. And we just added clear bra to the mix, and they did an excellent job with the applications. Very trusting of these guys with my CT5-V. Trust them as well, you won't be disappointed.”
— Steve E.

“On Point!!! Communication, Quality, Customer Service... All 5 star. I needed to get my truck ready to sell asap. I was wanting the full package, all the stuff. Dirty truck thats seen some miles and some roads. Honesty! They told me that I didn't need all the extras and gave me a detailed explanation and a package that would suffice for a great price.”
— Alex

“My experience started out looking for ceramic coating and thankfully Front Range Detail came up. It has the most 5 star reviews and I am another 5 star for them. The 1st thing that stood out to me was when we did the walk around my vehicle, they didn't try to up sell me...”

“We recently bought a new Jayco Class A Motorhome and wanted to ensure its bodywork stays in tip-top condition as long as possible. We engaged Sam and his team over 12 months ago to apply a ceramic coating and then regularly maintain and clean it since. They have done an amazing job and the unit still looks like it rolled off the assembly line yesterday despite Colorado weather and the miles.”
— Dean P.
Monday – Sunday: By Appointment Only

jsonld.name: Boat Detailing
jsonld.description: Professional boat detailing including exterior buffing, gelcoat restoration, interior cleaning and annual waxing with marine-grade products.

mainEntity.name: What types of boats do you work on?

acceptedAnswer.text: We work on all types — ski boats, pontoons, bass boats, sailboats and yachts. If it’s on the water, we can detail and protect it.

mainEntity.name: How often should I detail my boat?

acceptedAnswer.text: We recommend a full exterior detail and wax at least once a year, with interior cleaning as needed throughout the season.

mainEntity.name: Can you remove heavy oxidation from gelcoat?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — our multi-stage machine buffing and polishing restores faded, chalky gelcoat to a deep, glossy finish.
